docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY TOM, JESSE AS TO DEFENDANT HEADWAY CALIFORNIA BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-19-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $200.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HEADWAY CALIFORNIA BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
